chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 2978 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on MA No 2146/2018 15.02.2018. Mr. Sher Muhammad Laghari Advocate for petitioner Mr. Jangu Khan Special Prosecutor NAB -=-=- Learned counsel for the petitioner under the instructions of petitioner does not press instant constitutional petition which is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed/steno
